message:
feat(mission): multi-factor scoring function with effort, tags, and confidence threshold (ft-1i2ge.2.4)

Extends planner_features with: EffortBucket (5-level task sizing),
ScorerConfig (weights, bonuses, thresholds, tie-break epsilon),
score_candidates() producing deterministically-ranked ScorerReport.
Safety/regression tag bonuses, confidence gating, effort penalty.
22 new tests (59 total in module).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
